title: Shaded textures 8x (Demo)
description: 8 Bit Shaded Textures, game loads better. 300+ Textures
body:
# 8 Bit Shaded Textures

A clean, **8x8 resolution** texture pack that strips Minecraft down to its
roots — every texture redrawn at half the vanilla resolution for a crisp,
retro pixel-art look.

## What it is

This pack replaces **300+ block textures** with custom 8x8 versions. Some stay
faithful to vanilla, others are lightly redesigned for a cleaner, more minimal
feel. The result is a consistent low-res aesthetic across the game.

## Why use it?

- **Distinct style** — stands out from the sea of 16x+ packs; classic 8-bit
  look without being noisy
- **Lighter on your GPU** — 8x8 textures use less VRAM than vanilla 16x16,
  which can help on lower-end hardware
- **Still recognizable** — textures stay true enough to vanilla that you always
  know what you're looking at

## Status

> This pack is in **early beta**. Coverage is growing — expect more textures in
> future updates.


Have a suggestion or spot something ugly? Leave a comment — feedback shapes
what gets textured next.
